title: Who are Partnerblazers?
author: Amanda Backer

sections.heading: Introduction
sections.text: The strength of the Salesforce partner ecosystem lies in ourPartnerblazers– an innovative, supportive, and active community of partners driven by a shared commitment to customer success. As part of theTrailblazer community, this powerful collective brings together consultants, tech partners, and strategic tech partners, all dedicated to making a real impact. Whether you’re an aspiring leader, an alliance owner building strategic partnerships, or a go-to-market expert eager to share your influence and deep expertise with Salesforce and our valued customers, Partnerblazer is your community. ThePartnerblazer communityis home to partner professionals for connecting, learning, and celebrating in the agentic enterprise.

sections.heading: Meet Your Fellow Partnerblazers
sections.text: Partnerblazers are making incredible strides in the ecosystem. Here are a few examples of their innovative work. Atulya Risalof ComplianceQuest is delivering technology that supports regulatory environments, collaborating with global giants like J&J, 3M, Continental, and Flex. His vision has guided ComplianceQuest from its 2016 founding to a significant enterprise today, leveraging Salesforce’s AI infrastructure to embed intelligence across the quality lifecycle.ComplianceQuest’s AI strategy with Agentforceis designed around four core pillars: intelligent automation, predictive insights, contextual recommendations, and guided decision support, directly addressing long-standing inefficiencies in compliance and quality management. At Seismic,Tom Straderworks on an AI-powered integration that acts as a central hub for sales teams, equipping sellers with the right content, training, and insights at the right time. With theirAI-powered Agentforce integrated into Salesforce, Seismic is providing an intelligent assistant within the Salesforce workflow that can instantly answer questions, surface relevant content, automate follow-up tasks, and even guide sellers on the best next steps – all powered by AI. This integration tackles information overload and administrative burden, allowing customer-facing professionals to focus on building relationships and closing deals. Gili Lichtman Kurtzand the Hyro team are transforming how healthcare organizations improve operational efficiencies and patients’ access to care through responsible AI agents, Salesforce, and AgentExchange. Hyro’s AI agentsautomate appointment scheduling, prescription refill requests, provider search, and more, helping people get the care they need faster. Their collaboration with Salesforce began organically and evolved into a strategic partnership with the launch of Agentforce, where Hyro became one of the first ISV partners to launch a healthcare-specific action withinAgentExchange. A standout example of the Hyro and Salesforce partnership is Intermountain Health, which saw an 85% decrease in call abandonment rate, a 79% reduction in average patient wait time, and approximately 5,000 hours per month in capacity gains after implementing Hyro’s contact center AI agents integrated withSalesforce Health Cloud. Gili’s professional journey, from a classically trained opera singer to a leader in tech, inspires her proactive approach to leadership and innovation, advising partners to create their own marketing opportunities.

sections.heading: What’s in it for Partners
sections.text: As a Partnerblazer, you’ll unlock a world of valuable resources designed to accelerate your career and help you excel within the Salesforce partner ecosystem. You’ll gain essential skills, learn best practices, and connect with peers who share your drive for innovation. Connect with Peers:Join our dedicatedSlack workspacefor open discussions, valuable shared content, and abundant opportunities to connect, learn, and celebrate collective achievements.Learn and Develop Key Skills:Acquire essential partner and career skills to thrive in a dynamic environment.Celebrate Achievements:We celebrate the incredible accomplishments of individual Partnerblazers across our partner companies. ThePartnerblazer Slack workspacehas real-time, relationship-driven partnership development—where the most successful partnerships aren’t built in boardrooms, they’re built in Slack channels. These conversations create connections and community, which drives success.

sections.heading: The Journey Ahead: More Ways to Connect and Grow
sections.text: The Partnerblazer experience is constantly evolving, with exciting new additions on the horizon designed to further enrich your engagement and growth: Peer Awards:Be part of a unique opportunity to recognize and be recognized by your fellow Partnerblazers for outstanding achievements and significant contributions.Peer Meetups:Connect face-to-face with fellow Partnerblazers at informal gatherings strategically planned around key industry events.Mentorship Programs:Elevate your professional journey by connecting with experienced leaders within the community to accelerate your development and expand your knowledge.Referral Programs:Fuel our vibrant community by introducing fellow partners and being rewarded with exclusive perks. The future of partnerships is conversational. Join thousands of partner professionals who’ve discovered that breakthrough innovations start with a simple question: ‘Hey, has anyone else tried this?’ The best place to ask? The Partnerblazer Community on Slack—where conversations change careers and community drives the agentic enterprise forward.Become a Partnerblazer today.

raw_html:
The strength of the Salesforce partner ecosystem lies in our Partnerblazers – an innovative, supportive, and active community of partners driven by a shared commitment to customer success. As part of the Trailblazer community, this powerful collective brings together consultants, tech partners, and strategic tech partners, all dedicated to making a real impact.

Whether you’re an aspiring leader, an alliance owner building strategic partnerships, or a go-to-market expert eager to share your influence and deep expertise with Salesforce and our valued customers, Partnerblazer is your community.  The Partnerblazer community is home to partner professionals for connecting, learning, and celebrating in the agentic enterprise.

Meet Your Fellow Partnerblazers

Partnerblazers are making incredible strides in the ecosystem. Here are a few examples of their innovative work.

Atulya Risal of ComplianceQuest is delivering technology that supports regulatory environments, collaborating with global giants like J&J, 3M, Continental, and Flex.

His vision has guided ComplianceQuest from its 2016 founding to a significant enterprise today, leveraging Salesforce’s AI infrastructure to embed intelligence across the quality lifecycle. ComplianceQuest’s AI strategy with Agentforce is designed around four core pillars: intelligent automation, predictive insights, contextual recommendations, and guided decision support, directly addressing long-standing inefficiencies in compliance and quality management.

At Seismic, Tom Strader works on an AI-powered integration that acts as a central hub for sales teams, equipping sellers with the right content, training, and insights at the right time.

With their AI-powered Agentforce integrated into Salesforce, Seismic is providing an intelligent assistant within the Salesforce workflow that can instantly answer questions, surface relevant content, automate follow-up tasks, and even guide sellers on the best next steps – all powered by AI. This integration tackles information overload and administrative burden, allowing customer-facing professionals to focus on building relationships and closing deals.

Gili Lichtman Kurtz and the Hyro team are transforming how healthcare organizations improve operational efficiencies and patients’ access to care through responsible AI agents, Salesforce, and AgentExchange.

Hyro’s AI agents automate appointment scheduling, prescription refill requests, provider search, and more, helping people get the care they need faster. Their collaboration with Salesforce began organically and evolved into a strategic partnership with the launch of Agentforce, where Hyro became one of the first ISV partners to launch a healthcare-specific action within AgentExchange. 

A standout example of the Hyro and Salesforce partnership is Intermountain Health, which saw an 85% decrease in call abandonment rate, a 79% reduction in average patient wait time, and approximately 5,000 hours per month in capacity gains after implementing Hyro’s contact center AI agents integrated with Salesforce Health Cloud. Gili’s professional journey, from a classically trained opera singer to a leader in tech, inspires her proactive approach to leadership and innovation, advising partners to create their own marketing opportunities.

Subscribe to Our Exclusive Partner Communications

Be the first to know what matters. Subscribe to our partner newsletter and more for immediate access to critical updates, exclusive insights, and the resources you need to stay competitive.

Subscribe now

What’s in it for Partners

As a Partnerblazer, you’ll unlock a world of valuable resources designed to accelerate your career and help you excel within the Salesforce partner ecosystem. You’ll gain essential skills, learn best practices, and connect with peers who share your drive for innovation.

  • Connect with Peers: Join our dedicated Slack workspace for open discussions, valuable shared content, and abundant opportunities to connect, learn, and celebrate collective achievements.
  • Learn and Develop Key Skills: Acquire essential partner and career skills to thrive in a dynamic environment.
  • Celebrate Achievements: We celebrate the incredible accomplishments of individual Partnerblazers across our partner companies.

The Partnerblazer Slack workspace has real-time, relationship-driven partnership development—where the most successful partnerships aren’t built in boardrooms, they’re built in Slack channels. These conversations create connections and community, which drives success.

Level Up Faster: Join the Partnerblazer #Enablement Channel on Slack

Join now for exclusive access

The Journey Ahead: More Ways to Connect and Grow

The Partnerblazer experience is constantly evolving, with exciting new additions on the horizon designed to further enrich your engagement and growth:

  • Peer Awards: Be part of a unique opportunity to recognize and be recognized by your fellow Partnerblazers for outstanding achievements and significant contributions.
  • Peer Meetups: Connect face-to-face with fellow Partnerblazers at informal gatherings strategically planned around key industry events.
  • Mentorship Programs: Elevate your professional journey by connecting with experienced leaders within the community to accelerate your development and expand your knowledge.
  • Referral Programs: Fuel our vibrant community by introducing fellow partners and being rewarded with exclusive perks.

The future of partnerships is conversational. Join thousands of partner professionals who’ve discovered that breakthrough innovations start with a simple question: ‘Hey, has anyone else tried this?’ The best place to ask? The Partnerblazer Community on Slack—where conversations change careers and community drives the agentic enterprise forward. Become a Partnerblazer today.

Join Today
